creator: peo@nethead.se
text:
Should be obvious:

/usr/ports/www/horde-base # make
===>  horde-5.2.17 cannot install: unknown MySQL version: serve2.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/www/horde-base

I have no idea what "USE_MYSQL=      serve2" refers to but it certainly does not work
